title: The Headleys at Home
writer: Carrington North, William Miles, Nicholas Bella
actors: Evelyn Venable, Grant Mitchell, Robert Whitney
plot: Mrs. Headley, wife of the town banker, sets out to impress her social circle with the news that her husband is a great friend of a well-known financier from New York who is coming to town. The fact is Mr. Headley only knew him sli...
